case_title: WILLIAM D. WHITEMAN VS. TORRE MERCOGLIANO

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
WILLIAM D. WHITEMAN, ESQ., (415)989-3300, FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY, WILLIAM WHITEMAN
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE RESPONDENT/OPPOSING PARTY

THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER WILLIAM WHITEMAN'S Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
